category_sources: official Fabric site describes Fabric as a Minecraft mod development toolchain and provides installer downloads.
source_facts.description says fabric-installer is an installer for Fabric for the vanilla launcher.
display_name_sources: official FabricMC/fabric-installer repository is titled fabric-installer and describes it as an installer for Fabric.
docs_sources: official Fabric documentation provides player installation documentation for using the Fabric Installer.
repo_sources: official FabricMC GitHub organization is verified for fabricmc.net and hosts FabricMC/fabric-installer, described as an installer for Fabric.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Fabric installer behavior for the vanilla launcher.
source_facts.source-archive is a FabricMC Maven JAR artifact, indicating Java packaging.
